name: Tap Payments
description: Tap Payments — GCC payment gateway supporting cards, KNET, mada, benefit, Apple Pay, and STC Pay for Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Kuwait.

seo.title: Tap Payments — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Tap Payments: Tap Payments — GCC payment gateway supporting cards, KNET, mada, benefit, Apple Pay, and STC Pay for Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Kuwait.

when_to_use: Accepting mada, KNET, and Benefit for GCC online merchants
Apple Pay and STC Pay checkout for Saudi e-commerce apps
Recurring billing with 3DS authentication for MENA merchants

pros: Broadest GCC local method coverage available
KNET, mada, benefit, STC Pay supported
Apple Pay and cards alongside local rails
Strong presence in Saudi, UAE, Kuwait
cons: Fees higher than US/EU gateway peers
Docs and SDK polish behind Stripe-level
review.verdict: Go-to gateway for GCC merchants needing local method breadth — nobody else covers the region this well.
review.best_for: E-commerce selling into Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Kuwait needing local payment methods
review.not_for: Merchants outside MENA or needing best-in-class developer docs
